properties.description: Identifies tailnet devices with a non-empty TailnetLockError, indicating the device failed tailnet-lock cryptographic validation. Suspicious - likely an unsigned node attempting to join.
properties.description-detailed: Identifies tailnet devices with a non-empty TailnetLockError, indicating the device failed tailnet-lock cryptographic validation. Tailnet lock requires new node-keys be co-signed by trusted signers; errors here are the only direct signal of a node-key injection attempt.
properties.name: Tailscale: Tailnet lock validation failed
properties.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where isnotempty(TailnetLockError)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, ClientVersion, TailnetLockError, TailnetLockKey, LastSeen, Authorized
